ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "universal_size" TEXT /* Universal size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "france_size" INTEGER /* Size in France */,
  "usa_size" INTEGER /* Size in the USA */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the UK */,
  "italy_size" INTEGER /* Size in Italy */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the size is applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Product category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "universal_size" TEXT /* Universal size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level for the size */,
  "country_size" TEXT /* Size in the customer's country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warehouse information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_stock" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_stock_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_stock_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_stock_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size conversion entry
